title: Local Adaptation Protocol
one_sentence: This module defines how local AI systems may adapt SΔϕ routing, thresholds, outputs, and audit procedures while preserving core invariants.
core_thesis: SΔϕ is not a doctrine to be copied but an operational infrastructure to be locally adapted under preserved core invariants.

core_compression.adapter: local routing / threshold / output / audit layer
core_compression.valid_adaptation: local adaptation is valid iff core invariants are preserved
core_compression.fork: declared local divergence with compatibility report

core_invariants: adapter must not hide externalized cost
forbidden_mutations: turning SΔϕ into founder authority doctrine
